rule: The operator conversation remains Turkish. All CERBERRA public-facing YouTube outputs are English: titles, scripts, lyrics, captions, descriptions, tags, prompts, metadata, and upload fields.

brand_soul.name: CERBERRA
brand_soul.identity: guardian wolf of the cloud factory

first_release_pipeline: Render or assemble a 24-second vertical MP4.
If primarily child-directed, set Made for Kids correctly before public release.
Measure after 24 hours: views, retention, rewatches, likes, subscriber delta.
